title: Pronouncing Thoughts and Opinions
learningGoal: The learner will master the intonation of quoting thoughts, ensuring smooth linkage between the plain form verb and the phrase '~to omoimasu'.
instructions: In this exercise, practice stating your opinions. When saying 'to omoimasu', do not leave a large gap before the 'to'. It should flow naturally from the preceding word.

contentItems.text: Say 'Ikuto omoimasu' not 'Iku... to omoimasu'. The 'to' attaches closely to the word before it.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: いくと おもいます
こないと おもいます
targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: I think they will not come.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: たかいと おもいます
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Adding 'da' to an i-adjective (Takai da to omoimasu is wrong).

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: げんきだと おもいます
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Forgetting the 'da'. 'Genki to omoimasu' is wrong.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: ほんとうだと おもいます
targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: I think it is the truth.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: しないと おもいます
targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: I think I will not do it.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: たぶんと おもいます
targetPhrasesOrWords.baseTranslation: I think so, probably. (Note: This is slightly unnatural, usually tabun is used alone or at the start. So let's change phrase 7)

expectedPronunciationText: いくとおもいます こないとおもいます たかいとおもいます げんきだとおもいます ほんとうだとおもいます しないとおもいます

feedbackRules.onPass: Excellent! Your opinions flow very naturally.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! Link the 'to' directly to the end of the plain form word.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Pay close attention to 'da to omoimasu' when using nouns like 'Hontou'.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: いくとおもいます こないとおもいます たかいとおもいます げんきだとおもいます ほんとうだとおもいます しないとおもいます
acceptedVariants: いくと おもいます こないと おもいます たかいと おもいます げんきだと おもいます ほんとうだと おもいます しないと おもいます
adminCorrectAnswerSet.syllableSplitReference: i-ku-to-o-mo-i-ma-su ko-na-i-to-o-mo-i-ma-su ta-ka-i-to-o-mo-i-ma-su ge-n-ki-da-to-o-mo-i-ma-su ho-n-to-o-da-to-o-mo-i-ma-su shi-na-i-to-o-mo-i-ma-su
adminCorrectAnswerSet.phoneticApproximation: ikutoomoimasu konaitoomoimasu takaitoomoimasu genkidatoomoimasu hontoudatoomoimasu shinaitoomoimasu
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: いくとおもいます こないとおもいます たかいとおもいます げんきだとおもいます ほんとうだとおもいます しないとおもいます
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: Iku to omoimasu Konai to omoimasu Takai to omoimasu Genki da to omoimasu Hontou da to omoimasu Shinai to omoimasu

audioAssets.audioTranscript: いくと おもいます。こないと おもいます。たかいと おもいます。げんきだと おもいます。ほんとうだと おもいます。しないと おもいます。

hintText: Remember to use 'da to' for nouns (like Hontou) and na-adjectives (like Genki).
